info.name: Microsoft Azure ExpressRouteCrossConnection REST APIs
info.description: The Microsoft Azure ExpressRouteCrossConnection Resource Provider REST APIs describes the operations for the connectivity provider to provision ExpressRoute circuit, create and modify BGP peering entities and troubleshoot connectivity on customer's ExpressRoute circuit.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Network Expressroutecrossconnections

request.description: Retrieves all the ExpressRouteCrossConnections in a subscription.

response.name: Request successful. The operation returns a list of ExpressRouteCrossConnection resources. If there are no cross connection resources an empty list is returned.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Expressroutecrossconnections Crossconnectionname Peerings Peeringname Arptables Devicepath

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group.

request.description: Gets the currently advertised ARP table associated with the express route cross connection in a resource group.

response.name: Request successful. The operation returns the resulting ExpressRouteCrossConnectionsArpTable resource.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Accepted and the operation will complete asynchronously.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Accepted and the operation will complete asynchronously.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Expressroutecrossconnections Crossconnectionname Peerings Peeringname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group.

request.description: Deletes the specified peering from the ExpressRouteCrossConnection.

response.name: Delete successful.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Accepted and the operation will complete asynchronously.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Expressroutecrossconnections Crossconnectionname Peerings Peeringname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group.

request.description: Gets the specified peering for the ExpressRouteCrossConnection.

response.name: Request successful. The operation returns the resulting ExpressRouteCrossConnectionPeering resource.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Expressroutecrossconnections Crossconnectionname Peerings Peeringname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group.

request.description: Creates or updates a peering in the specified ExpressRouteCrossConnection.

response.name: Update successful. The operation returns the resulting ExpressRouteCrossConnectionPeering resource.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Create successful. The operation returns the resulting ExpressRouteCrossConnectionPeering resource.

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Expressroutecrossconnections Crossconnectionname Peerings

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group.

request.description: Gets all peerings in a specified ExpressRouteCrossConnection.

response.name: Request successful. The operation returns a list of ExpressRouteCrossConnectionPeering resources.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Expressroutecrossconnections Crossconnectionname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group (peering location of the circuit).
(Required) The name of the ExpressRouteCrossConnection (service key of the circuit).

request.description: Gets details about the specified ExpressRouteCrossConnection.

response.name: Request successful. The operation returns the resulting ExpressRouteCrossConnection resource.

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Patch Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Expressroutecrossconnections Crossconnectionname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the cross connection.

request.description: Updates an express route cross connection tags.

response.name: Update successful. The operation returns the resulting ExpressRouteCrossConnection resource.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Expressroutecrossconnections

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group.

request.description: Retrieves all the ExpressRouteCrossConnections in a resource group.

response.name: Request successful.The operation returns a list of ExpressRouteCrossConnection resources. If there are no cross connection resources an empty list is returned.
